parents.subject: LU-12668 tests: add EC layout pattern tests

commit.subject: LU-12668 tests: add EC edge case tests
commit.message:
LU-12668 tests: add EC edge case tests

Add tests 58a-62d exercising EC recovery edge cases:

- test_58a-d: latent bug investigation -- patterns
  that historically triggered recovery issues
- test_59a-d: sparse files -- recovery with holes
  and non-contiguous data regions
- test_60a-d: truncate during degradation -- verify
  truncate works correctly on degraded EC files
- test_61a-d: sub-stripe files -- files smaller than
  one full stripe
- test_62a-d: append writes -- recovery after append
  operations on EC files

Generated with Claude Code + Tools

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: testlist=sanity-ec
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I2159ad3b79364d2c13b029ade3c4bb45779c68c2
